requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — SASO-adopted IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——SASO采纳的IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——SASO採納的IEC 62133

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs placed on the Saudi market must meet the mandatory safety requirements of the applicable SASO technical regulation, which relies on SASO-adopted IEC 62133 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems) as the core cell-safety standard. Conformity is demonstrated through testing at a laboratory acceptable to a SASO-notified conformity assessment body, frequently leveraging the IECEE CB Scheme — a CB Test Certificate and CB Test Report to IEC 62133-2 issued by an NCB are accepted as the technical basis for a Saudi Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC). The standard covers abuse testing (overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and electrochemical performance limits, and forms the safety evidence in the SABER technical file.
summary.zh: 投放沙特市场的便携式锂电芯及电池组，须满足适用SASO技术法规的强制安全要求，其核心电芯安全标准为SASO采纳的IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求——第2部分：锂系统）。符合性通过在SASO认可的合格评定机构可接受的实验室进行测试予以证明，并经常借助IECEE CB体系——由NCB依据IEC 62133-2签发的CB测试证书及CB测试报告，被接受作为沙特产品符合证书（PCoC）的技术依据。该标准涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学性能限值，构成SABER技术文件中的安全证据。
summary.zht: 投放沙特市場的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，須滿足適用SASO技術法規的強制安全要求，其核心電芯安全標準為SASO採納的IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求——第2部分：鋰系統）。符合性通過在SASO認可的合格評定機構可接受的實驗室進行測試予以證明，並經常借助IECEE CB體系——由NCB依據IEC 62133-2簽發的CB測試證書及CB測試報告，被接受作為沙特產品符合證書（PCoC）的技術依據。該標準涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學性能限值，構成SABER技術文件中的安全證據。

standards_or_laws: SASO-adopted IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems
IECEE CB Scheme — CB Test Certificate and CB Test Report to IEC 62133-2 (accepted route for Saudi conformity)
Applicable SASO technical regulation for batteries / electrical products (enforced via SABER)

summary.en: China's primary safety standards for portable lithium battery packs are GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment — revised edition) and GB 18287-2013 (General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones, under revision). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. Testing by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 is NOT, by itself, recognised as the conformity basis for a Saudi Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) under the SASO/SABER pathway.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求，修订版）和GB 18287-2013（手机用锂离子电池总规范，修订中）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的检测报告，本身不被认可作为SASO/SABER路径下沙特产品符合证书（PCoC）的符合性依据。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求，修訂版）和GB 18287-2013（手機用鋰離子電池總規範，修訂中）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的檢測報告，本身不被認可作為SASO/SABER路徑下沙特產品符合證書（PCoC）的符合性依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Exporters should build cell-safety evidence to SASO-adopted IEC 62133-2 for the Saudi PCoC. The most efficient route is the IECEE CB Scheme: an IEC 62133-2 CB Test Certificate and CB Test Report issued by a recognised NCB are accepted by SASO-notified bodies, whereas a GB 31241 report is not directly transferable. Key gaps: (1) test severity differences between GB 31241 and IEC 62133-2 in crush and overcharge tests may require re-test or supplementary testing; (2) the Saudi route requires a PCoC issued through SABER by a SASO-notified conformity assessment body, supported by the CB documentation; (3) Saudi labelling and Arabic marking requirements have no equivalent in Chinese domestic export requirements.
gap.zh: 出口商应针对沙特PCoC建立符合SASO采纳的IEC 62133-2的电芯安全证据。最高效路径是IECEE CB体系：由认可NCB签发的IEC 62133-2 CB测试证书及CB测试报告被SASO认可机构接受，而GB 31241报告不可直接转用。主要差距：（1）GB 31241与IEC 62133-2在挤压和过充测试上的严苛程度差异，可能须重新测试或补充测试；（2）沙特路径要求由SASO认可的合格评定机构通过SABER签发PCoC，并以CB文件作为支持；（3）沙特标签及阿拉伯文标识要求在中国国内出口要求中无对应规定。
gap.zht: 出口商應針對沙特PCoC建立符合SASO採納的IEC 62133-2的電芯安全證據。最高效路徑是IECEE CB體系：由認可NCB簽發的IEC 62133-2 CB測試證書及CB測試報告被SASO認可機構接受，而GB 31241報告不可直接轉用。主要差距：（1）GB 31241與IEC 62133-2在擠壓和過充測試上的嚴苛程度差異，可能須重新測試或補充測試；（2）沙特路徑要求由SASO認可的合格評定機構通過SABER簽發PCoC，並以CB文件作為支持；（3）沙特標籤及阿拉伯文標識要求在中國國內出口要求中無對應規定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SASO technical regulation requires cell-safety conformity to SASO-adopted IEC 62133-2 as the basis for a SABER Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC); IECEE CB Test Certificate/Report to IEC 62133-2 is the commonly accepted technical route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Saudi market placement requires cell-safety conformity to SASO-adopted IEC 62133-2, evidenced for a SABER Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC). The IECEE CB Scheme (CB Test Certificate and Report to IEC 62133-2) is the commonly accepted technical route and is recognised by SASO-notified bodies. Chinese GB 31241 certification does not by itself satisfy the Saudi conformity basis, so exporters should obtain or convert to IEC 62133-2 evidence and route it through a SASO-notified conformity assessment body via SABER.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入沙特市场须符合SASO采纳的IEC 62133-2电芯安全要求，并作为SABER产品符合证书（PCoC）的证据。IECEE CB体系（IEC 62133-2的CB测试证书及报告）是常见可接受的技术路径，并被SASO认可机构承认。中国GB 31241认证本身不能满足沙特符合性依据，因此出口商应取得或转换为IEC 62133-2证据，并通过SASO认可的合格评定机构经SABER提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入沙特市場須符合SASO採納的IEC 62133-2電芯安全要求，並作為SABER產品符合證書（PCoC）的證據。IECEE CB體系（IEC 62133-2的CB測試證書及報告）是常見可接受的技術路徑，並被SASO認可機構承認。中國GB 31241認證本身不能滿足沙特符合性依據，因此出口商應取得或轉換為IEC 62133-2證據，並通過SASO認可的合格評定機構經SABER提交。

source.publisher: Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)
